a.xlink:title: Executes the request delegate without policy.
Executes the flurl request with Policy.
Sends DELETE request with awaiting serialized body response.
Sends GET request with awaiting serialized body response.
Sends GET request with awaiting byte array response.
Sends GET request with awaiting Stream response.
Sends POST request with specified serialized body.
